actors.name: Nordic Deliberation
actors.description: Coalition of four leading democracy organizations across Scandinavia: We Do Democracy (Denmark), Sitra (Finland), Digidem Lab (Sweden), and SoCentral (Norway). Accelerating the deliberative wave across the Nordic region.
actors.contact_pathway: Unites We Do Democracy, Sitra, Digidem Lab, and SoCentral into single operational coalition
actors.notes: Direct collaborator candidate. Most critical network for ASSEMBLY orientation in the Nordics. Access to foremost experts, methodologies, and technological platforms for planetary governance prototype.

intel.value: Supporting large-scale deliberative projects; building capacity in public and private democracy sectors; compiling methodological knowledge bank for citizens' assemblies in Nordic context
We Do Democracy (Denmark), Sitra (Finland), Digidem Lab (Sweden), SoCentral (Norway)
Pan-Nordic coalition addressing declining institutional trust through accelerated deliberative democracy across all Nordic countries
Access to foremost experts, methodologies, and technological platforms for designing scientifically rigorous and culturally adapted planetary governance prototype
Coalition pooling resources and expertise to empower citizens; supplementing representative democracies with robust participatory mechanisms

actors.name: SoCentral
actors.description: Norwegian organization and partner in the Nordic Deliberation network, contributing to the pan-Nordic deliberative democracy initiative.
actors.connection: Mentioned as Nordic Deliberation partner - Norway representative
actors.contact_pathway: Via Nordic Deliberation network and We Do Democracy
actors.notes: Limited detail in source text; identified as the Norwegian arm of Nordic Deliberation.

intel.value: Nordic Deliberation network (We Do Democracy, Sitra, Digidem Lab)
Norwegian representative in pan-Nordic deliberative democracy coalition
